metadata.excluded: 14 airports with no coordinates — Along, Ambala, Bokaro Steel City, Daltonganj, Daporijo, Diglipur, Jaggayyapeta, Jharsuguda (Veer Surendra Sai), Kakinada, Mehsana, North Lakhimpur, Ongole, Rono Hills, Silapathar
metadata.description: India Airports – Unified Dataset (GEE Assessment + Local Analysis + Operational + Green Energy + Notable Green)

data_notes.traffic_cargo_figures: Based on publicly available AAI Annual Reports, MoCA data, and AAI Green Airport disclosures (FY2022-24 approximate)
data_notes.solar_green_data: Sourced from AAI Sustainability Reports, CIAL, BIAL, GHIAL, DIAL annual reports and press releases
data_notes.na_meaning: Data not publicly available or not applicable for that airport type
data_notes.less_than_0_1_meaning: Very limited operations - under 100,000 passengers per year

row_highlight_legend.green_background: Airport has significant/notable Green designation (World's first solar-powered, IGBC Platinum, ACI Level 4+, etc.) — see is_notable_green field

green_airport_classification.AAI_Green_Initiative: Solar panels installed, partial renewable energy; AAI's general programme
green_airport_classification.ACI_Level_2: Airport Carbon Accreditation Level 2 - Reduction (active emissions reduction)
green_airport_classification.ACI_Level_3plus: Airport Carbon Accreditation Level 3+ - Neutrality (scope 1&2 neutralised)
green_airport_classification.ACI_Level_4plus: Airport Carbon Accreditation Level 4+ - Transformation (supply chain included)

sources: India Airports Database incl. Green Airports (Excel)
